title: Padichu Paathen Song Lyrics Polladhavan
stanzas: <div>Padichu Paathen Song Lyrics Polladhavan

Padichu paaththen yearavilla
kudichu paaththen yeariduchu(2)

sirichu paathean sirikkavilla
morachu paathean sikkiduchchu

naange appaa kaasil beeradippom
S.M.S. il saittadippom
 vetti payannu peareduppom
city bussil visiladippom (2)

Indha vayasu ponaa
veara vayasu illa
azhage rasikkalennaa
avanthaan manushane illa

Padichu paaththen yearavilla
kudichu paaththen yeariduchu

Kalyaanatha seiyum bodhu
panjaangaththai paarppavane
kaadhalikka panjangatha paarppadhillaye

naalu nearam paarththu paarththu
mudhaliravu poravane
pulle porakkum nearaththa
nee solla mudiyumaa

rendu viralil sigarettu vachu
izhukkumbodhu thee pandham
pazhiya soththa pothachu vachu
parugumbodhu aanandham
kanavu illa kavala illa
ivanppola evanum illa

Indha vayasu ponaa
veara vayasu illa
azhage rasikkalennaa
avanthaan manushane illa

Padichu paaththen yearavilla
kudichu paaththen yeariduch

Ennadi ennadi muniyammaa
veththala maiyi muniyammaa
yaar vacha maiyi muniyammaa
naan vacha maiyi muniyammaa

Pattucheela koottaththil
patttamboochchi pole vanthu
pambaramaa aadapporean
onga munnaale

ye maadi veettu maalavikaa
vaazhmeenu pole vanthu
pallakkaatti kooppiduthu
paadhi kannaale

narambu ellaam murukku yeara
nadanamaada poreandaa
malluveatti maappille paiyaa
machchaan koode aadeandaa

puduchu aadu mudichu aadu
vidinja pinnaal mudichupodu

Indha vayasu ponaa
veara vayasu illa
azhage rasikkalennaa
avanthaan manushane illa

Padichu paaththen yearavilla
kudichu paaththen yeariduchu(2)

sirichu paathean sirikkavilla
morachu paathean sikkiduchchu

naange appaa kaasil beeradippom

 vetti payannu peareduppom

seo.title: Padichu Paathen Song Lyrics Polladhavan
seo.description: Full Padichu Paathen songs lyrics, Polladhavan Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Dhina, Singer(s): Shankar Mahadevan.
seo.keywords: Polladhavan, Dhina, Shankar Mahadevan, Padichu Paathen full lyrics, Polladhavan songs lyrics, Padichu Paathen lyrics snippets, Padichu Paathen WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Padichu Paathen lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Padichu Paathen conveys a sense of carefree enjoyment and youthful spirit, celebrating life's fun moments.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Polladhavan, the song reflects the protagonist's vibrant lifestyle and his adventures, adding to the film's energetic narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by Dhina.

When was the song released?

Padichu Paathen was released on November 8, 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Padichu Paathen, the protagonist revels in the joys of life, showcasing a carefree attitude that resonates with the audience. The upbeat tempo and lively lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and happiness, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The song encapsulates the youthful exuberance and thrill of living in the moment, evoking feelings of joy and energy. Overall, it serves as a reminder to embrace life's fun experiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Padichu Paathen from Polladhavan is an electrifying anthem that showcases Shankar Mahadevan's dynamic vocals paired with Dhina's infectious beats. This song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and celebration, making it a perfect addition to any party playlist. Dive into the vibrant energy of this track that has become a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: I studied and saw nothing, I drank and saw nothing.
I laughed and saw nothing, I got confused and saw nothing.
We will drink beer in the city, we will send messages, we will waste time in the city bus.
At this age, there is no other age, if I enjoy beauty, that person is not human.
I studied and saw nothing, I drank and saw nothing.
When getting married, they only look at the family, they don't look at love.
After watching for four hours, can you say if the first person will come out?
When two fingers hold a cigarette and it burns, the joy of running is not a dream, there is no worry, there is no one like him.
At this age, there is no other age, if I enjoy beauty, that person is not human.
I studied and saw nothing, I drank and saw nothing.
What is it, what is it, my dear? Who is the one who made a fool of me?
In the group of singers, like a flower, they come and sing, they are like your past.
Oh, the house is like a flower, it calls out like a half-eyed girl.
All the nerves are twisted, they will dance, the boy will dance with the girl.
New dance, finish the dance, after that, tie it up.
At this age, there is no other age, if I enjoy beauty, that person is not human.
I studied and saw nothing, I drank and saw nothing.
I laughed and saw nothing, I got confused and saw nothing.
We will drink beer in the city, we will send messages, we will waste time in the city bus.
At this age, there is no other age, if I enjoy beauty, that person is not human.
